ops.replace_with:

    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW" />

ops.text: Add pagination support: Update Edge Function, ApiHelper, and BuildAdapter with 'Load More' footer

ops.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
    android:padding="16dp">

    <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton
        android:id="@+id/btn_load_more"
        style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:text="Load More Builds"
        android:textColor="#3b82f6"
        app:strokeColor="#3b82f6"
        xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" />
</FrameLayout>

operations.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
    android:padding="16dp">

    <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton
        android:id="@+id/btn_load_more"
        style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton"
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:text="Load More Builds"
        android:textColor="#3b82f6"
        app:strokeColor="#3b82f6"
        xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" />
</FrameLayout>

ops.text: Implement Repo history suggestions using MaterialAutoCompleteTextView

ops.find_block:
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText
                    android:id="@+id/input_repo"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:textColor="#FFFFFF"
                    android:inputType="text" />
ops.replace_with:
<com.google.android.material.textfield.MaterialAutoCompleteTextView
                    android:id="@+id/input_repo"
                    android:layout_width="match_parent"
                    android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                    android:textColor="#FFFFFF"
                    android:inputType="text"
                    android:completionThreshold="0"
                    android:popupBackground="#2C2C2C" />

ops.find_block:
val recycler = findViewById<RecyclerView>(R.id.recycler_builds)
        val inputRepo = findViewById<TextInputEditText>(R.id.input_repo)
        val switchAuto = findViewById<com.google.android.material.switchmaterial.SwitchMaterial>(R.id.switch_auto_update)
ops.replace_with:
val recycler = findViewById<RecyclerView>(R.id.recycler_builds)
        val inputRepo = findViewById<com.google.android.material.textfield.MaterialAutoCompleteTextView>(R.id.input_repo)
        val switchAuto = findViewById<com.google.android.material.switchmaterial.SwitchMaterial>(R.id.switch_auto_update)

ops.find_block:
inputRepo.setText(savedRepo)
        switchAuto.isChecked = prefs.getBoolean("auto_update", false)
ops.replace_with:
inputRepo.setText(savedRepo)
        switchAuto.isChecked = prefs.getBoolean("auto_update", false)

        // Setup Suggestions
        val historySet = prefs.getStringSet("repo_history", setOf("GetyeTek/Notify")) ?: setOf()
        repoHistory.addAll(historySet)
        repoAdapter = android.widget.ArrayAdapter(this, android.R.layout.simple_dropdown_item_1line, repoHistory)
        inputRepo.setAdapter(repoAdapter)
        
        // Show dropdown when user clicks the empty field
        inputRepo.setOnTouchListener { v, _ ->
            (v as? com.google.android.material.textfield.MaterialAutoCompleteTextView)?.showDropDown()
            false
        }
